message:
bench(decision): add Criterion benchmarks for escalation, fleet-registry, fleet-pattern, fleet-fdr (process_triage-dki.14)

12 benchmark groups, 40 scenarios covering EscalationManager
(submit/flush/persist/prune), FleetRegistry (register/heartbeat/check),
correlate_fleet_patterns (grid scaling/deploy correlation), and
FleetFdrCoordinator (submit_e_value/rebalance/pool_evidence/compute_fdr).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
